case_title: HIRAM LEE VS. RAFAEL MORALES ET AL

ORDER DISMISSING DEFENDANT RAFAEL MORALES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, HIRAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, RAFAEL RINALDI, FRANK $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,175.00, DEFENDANTS ARE JOINTLY AND SERVERALLY LIABLE FOR THE JUDGEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE (GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND CONTINUING MATTER FOR TRIAL) - PLEASE SEE SCANNED ORDER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HIRAM LEE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT FRANK RINALDI. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RAFAEL MORALES. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF HIRAM LEE OR DEFENDANT FRANK RINALDI, PLAINTIFF'S CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK RINALDI ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL BY THE POST OFFICE. DEC 12 2023. OFF CALENDAR ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (ENVELOPE MARKED RETURNED TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT: WILL NOT STIPULATE

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY FRANK RINALDI IS GRANTED AS TO FRANK RINALDI ONLY. CONTINUED TO NOV-20-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF HIRAM LEE, AND DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, FRANK RINALDI ARE PRESENT. KRISS MIRANDA, PROPERTY MANAGER FOR MR. LEE IS ALSO PRESENT. JUDGE: HONORABLE SUZANNE RAMOS BOLANOS. CLERK: L. BARENG. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D303)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RINALDI, FRANK HEARING SET FOR SEP-15-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY RAFAEL MORALES, FRANK RINALDI SET FOR SEP-15-2023 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-04-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN 506. ***DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM*** PLAINTIFF HIRAM LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAFAEL MORALES IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANK RINALDI IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

***THIS IS A RETURNING NON-STIP MATTER*** MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY RAFAEL MORALES, FRANK RINALDI SET FOR OCT-04-2023 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-06-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 303/JUDGE SUZANNE R. BOLANOS. PLAINTIFF HIRAM LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANK RINALDI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAFAEL MORALES IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES ARE INFORMED THAT THIS NON-STIP MATTER IS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 303/JUDGE SUZANNE R. BOLANOS. PARTIES ARE INSTRUCTED TO REPORT TO DEPT. 303 ON FRIDAY, OCTOBER 6, 2023 AT 10:00 A.M. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
